name: personal-project-manager
description: Personal Project Manager is a VS Code extension that provides a dedicated tree view interface for organizing and managing logical "projects". Unlike file/folder management extensions, this extension enables users to create custom project definitions that aggregate files and folders from anywhere on their filesystem into a single coherent view. Projects are scoped to a root directory but can include manually linked external files and folders, creating a flexible organizational system that transcends filesystem boundaries.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
